name: phpdot/filesystem
description: Coroutine-safe, PSR-native file storage for the PHPdot ecosystem: local and S3-compatible (AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, MinIO, DigitalOcean Spaces) over a PSR-18 + SigV4 client, with typed streams, resumable chunked uploads and first-class progress.

suggest.phpdot/container: Auto-binds LocalAdapter to AdapterInterface via #[Singleton] + #[Binds]; rebind AdapterInterface to swap backends.
suggest.phpdot/package: Auto-discovers the filesystem binding and config DTO via attribute scanning.
suggest.phpdot/config: Hydrates FilesystemConfig from the generated config/filesystem.php.
suggest.phpdot/console: Provides the filesystem:upload, filesystem:purge-sessions and filesystem:purge-files commands.
suggest.phpdot/http: Provides the PSR-15 resumable (tus-style) upload endpoint for browser clients.
suggest.phpdot/event: Dispatches UploadProgressed / DownloadProgressed / UploadCompleted / UploadFailed PSR-14 events.
suggest.phpdot/cache: PSR-16 backing for the resumable session store across workers/nodes.
suggest.psr/http-client-implementation: A PSR-18 client (e.g. guzzlehttp/guzzle) for the S3 transport.
